Flow.description: Manages Phone/Mobile update and Lead Status Tracker record creation

value.stringValue: OR( AND( ISPICKVAL([Lead].Status, 'New'), ISCHANGED([Lead].Status)), AND( ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL([Lead].Status, 'New') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_5
formulas.expression: OR( AND( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status}, 'New'), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status})), AND( ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status}, 'New') ) )

Flow.label: Lead Management - On Create and Edit
